mapper.sql: ROrderNo, ROrderItem, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, DlvDate, DlvType, OptCode, OptState, RcvClassify, StockCode, CProductNo, ExpInvCode, OrdTransType, SpecOfferNo, OptDate, ProdFlag, SpecMark, OROrderNo, InvFlag, NDlvDate, Discount, Opttime, Operator, Remark, SHIKOMI, OptRecord, Price_EndUser, SmcCode, DlvDate_BJ, CProductName, PreSaleOrderNo, Opponent, EPrice, StockCustomerNo, FullOrderNo, InvoiceGroupKey, ext_orderno, ext_order_item, OrderSourceSys, Inserttime
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.mig_RcvDetail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.mig_RcvDetail (ROrderNo, ROrderItem, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, DlvDate, DlvType, OptCode, OptState, RcvClassify, StockCode, CProductNo, ExpInvCode, OrdTransType, SpecOfferNo, OptDate, ProdFlag, SpecMark, OROrderNo, InvFlag, NDlvDate, Discount, Opttime, Operator, Remark, SHIKOMI, OptRecord, Price_EndUser, SmcCode, DlvDate_BJ, CProductName, PreSaleOrderNo, Opponent, EPrice, StockCustomerNo, FullOrderNo, InvoiceGroupKey, ext_orderno, ext_order_item, OrderSourceSys, Inserttime) values (#{rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rorderitem,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optstate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cproductno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{expinvcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{specofferno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{specmark,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ororderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{invflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ndlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{discount,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{shikomi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{smccode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvdateBj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cproductname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{presaleorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opponent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{stockcustomerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{fullorderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{invoicegroupkey,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{extOrderno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{extOrderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordersourcesys,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

update dbo.mig_RcvDetail
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROrderItem = #{record.rorderitem,jdbcType=CHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
